data.heading: AccessCategoryCode
data.text: A code that indicates categories of access to a location that can affect the applicability of a regulation.

data.heading: AccessControlDevice
data.text: A device that is used to control access to a specific area, such as a gate or barrier.

data.heading: AccessControlTypeCode
data.text: A code that indicates the type of access control device.

data.heading: ActivationStatusCode
data.text: A code indicating the activation status of an object

data.heading: ChannelizationDevice
data.text: A device that is used to guide or direct traffic, such as a curb or a series of cones, barrels, or barricades.

data.heading: ChannelizationTypeCode
data.text: A code that indicates the type of channelization device.

data.heading: CodePairRegulationCode
data.text: A code indicating the type of regulation that is associated with a code pair.

data.heading: CodedPairRegulation
data.text: A restriction defined by a code.

data.heading: CodedRegulation
data.text: A restriction defined by a code.

data.heading: CodedRegulationWithFee
data.text: A condition defined by a code.

data.heading: CodedRegulationWithThreshold
data.text: A restriction defined by a code coupled with a threshold value.

data.heading: CompositeSign
data.text: A single traffic-control unit whose content is an ordered sequence of one or more SimpleSigns, represented as an rdf:List: rdf:first is the main sign, and each rdf:rest step is the next panel in order (for example supplemental signs).

data.heading: Condition
data.text: A boolean condition that must evaluate to true for the associated regulation(s) to currently apply. Even if the condition is true, it is not active if it is currently overridden. The condition may be multi-part.

data.heading: ConditionCode
data.text: A code that indicates the enumerated types of conditions that affect the applicability of a regulation.

data.heading: ConditionSet
data.text: A composite condition that consists of two or more Conditions combined by a logical operator; the set must evaluate to true for the associated regulation(s) to currently apply.

data.heading: ContextRegulationCode
data.text: A code indicating the context of a regulation that is associated with a code pair.

data.heading: DestinationInfo
data.text: An attribute that indicates destination information, such as distance to destination or direction to destination.

data.heading: DriverCategoryCode
data.text: A code that indicates categories of drivers that can affect the applicability of a regulation.

data.heading: EnumeratedCondition
data.text: A condition that is based on an enumerated value in a known code list.

data.heading: FeeRegulationCode
data.text: A code indicating the type of regulation that is associated with a fee schedule.

data.heading: InternationalSign
data.text: A traffic control device that is used to convey information to road users, such as regulatory, warning, or guide signs.

data.heading: LegalBasis
data.text: A legal basis provides references to the legal documents that authorize an entity to issue the types of regulations covered by a traffic regulation order.

data.heading: LocationCondition
data.text: A condition that applies to a specific location.

data.heading: LogicalOperatorCode
data.text: A code that indicates how the members of a ConditionSet are combined (for example AND, OR, XOR, NOT, etc.).

data.heading: MeasurableCondition
data.text: A condition that is based on a comparison between a measurable value and a threshold value.

data.heading: MeasurableConditionCode
data.text: A code that indicates the type of measurable condition that is assessed, including both the type of measure and the type of entity being measured.

data.heading: NonVehicularRoadUserCode
data.text: A code that indicates categories of non-vehicular road users that can affect the applicability of a regulation.

data.heading: PavementMarking
data.text: A device that is used to mark the pavement, such as lines, symbols, or text.

data.heading: PavementMarkingTypeCode
data.text: A code that indicates the type of pavement marking device.

data.heading: Permit
data.text: Certificate that indicates designations that are associated with the grantee.

data.heading: PermitApplicationInformation
data.text: Details about the application of the permit.

data.heading: PermitDesignationCode
data.text: A code that indicates the designation of the permit.

data.heading: PermitDisplayTypeCode
data.text: A code that indicates the type of display that is associated with the permit.

data.heading: PermitGranteeTypeCode
data.text: A code that indicates the type of grantee of the permit.

data.heading: PermitGrantorTypeCode
data.text: A code that indicates the type of grantor of the permit.

data.heading: PermitRequiredCondition
data.text: A condition that is based on the possession of a permit.

data.heading: PermitType
data.text: A category of certificate that the grantor is able to issue to designate a grantee as a specific type of entity.

data.heading: ReasonCode
data.text: A code indicating the reason for the traffic regulation order.

data.heading: RegistrationMachine
data.text: A machine that is used to register the permit.

data.heading: RegulationDataProperty
data.text: A data property to organize all data properties defined in the Traffic Regulation topic area of the ITS Ontology.

data.heading: RegulationObjectProperty
data.text: An object property to organize all object properties defined in the Traffic Regulation topic area of the ITS Ontology.

data.heading: RegulationThing
data.text: A class to organize all classes defined in the Traffic Regulation topic area of the ITS Ontology.

data.heading: RegulatoryScopeCode
data.text: A code indicating the regulatory scope of a rule maker role.

data.heading: RoadSurfaceFeature
data.text: A traffic control device that changes the nature of the road surface, such as rumble strips or speed bumps.

data.heading: RoadSurfaceFeatureTypeCode
data.text: A code that indicates the type of road surface feature.

data.heading: RoadTypeCode
data.text: A code that indicates categories of roads that can affect the applicability of a regulation.

data.heading: RoadWeatherConditionCode
data.text: A code that indicates the types of road weather conditions that can affect the applicability of a regulation.

data.heading: RuleMakerRole
data.text: A Role that includes the responsibility for creating and maintaining rules of the road or regulations for a geographic and operational scope as defined by the parent jurisdictional entity.

data.heading: SignDestination
data.text: A destination that is indicated on the road sign.

data.heading: SimpleSign
data.text: A traffic control device that consists of a single message conveyed by a single pictogram.

data.heading: StandAloneRegulationCode
data.text: A code indicating the type of regulation that does not require any supplemental information.

data.heading: StandingOrParkingCategoryCode
data.text: A code that indicates categories of standing or parking that can affect the applicability of a regulation.

data.heading: TextComposite
data.text: An attribute that consists of text (multi-lingual string) on the default area of the main pictogram.

data.heading: TextualRegulation
data.text: A textual regulation is a rule having the force of law that is established by a regulator through a traffic regulation order.

data.heading: ThresholdRegulationCode
data.text: A code indicating the type of regulation that requires a threshold value.

data.heading: TimeValidityCondition
data.text: A condition that applies to a specific location.

data.heading: TrafficControlDevice
data.text: A device that is used to control traffic, such as a road sign, traffic signal, or pavement marking.

data.heading: TrafficRegulation
data.text: A traffic regulation is a rule having the force of law that is established by a regulator through a traffic regulation order.

data.heading: TrafficRegulationOrder
data.text: A legally recognized document or publication issued to enact a specific traffic regulation or regulations by a competent authority.

data.heading: TrafficSignal
data.text: A traffic control device that is used to control traffic flow at intersections or pedestrian crossings using lights.

data.heading: TrafficSignalDevice
data.text: A device that is used to control traffic signals, including traffic lights and warning beacons.

data.heading: TroStatusCode
data.text: A code indicating the lifecycle status of a traffic regulation order

data.heading: TunnelCategoryCode
data.text: A code that indicates categories of tunnels that can affect the applicability of a regulation.

data.heading: VersionedCondition
data.text: A specific version of a condition that can be referenced by a ConditionReference.

data.heading: WarningBeacon
data.text: A device that is used to warn road users of potential hazards or to draw attention to specific conditions using lights or signals.

data.heading: accessControlType
data.text: A code that indicates the type of access control device.

data.heading: applicableLocation
data.text: The location associated with the condition.

data.heading: arrowDirection
data.text: A direction that is indicated on the road sign.

data.heading: associatedTrafficControlDevice
data.text: A traffic control device associated with the instance of the traffic regulation.

data.heading: authorizingTrafficRegulation
data.text: A traffic regulation that authorizes the instance of the traffic control device.

data.heading: channelizationType
data.text: A code that indicates the type of channelization device.

data.heading: comparisonOperator
data.text: The operator used to compare the value to the threshold value.

data.heading: destinationHorizon
data.text: The distance to the destination or the time to the destination.

data.heading: destinationPlace
data.text: The place to which the road sign is pointing.

data.heading: destinationRoad
data.text: The road to which the road sign is pointing.

data.heading: divergeHorizon
data.text: The distance between the sign and the junction or diverge point that leads to the point of interest.

data.heading: divergeName
data.text: The name of the point of interest (e.g., destination or current location for direction 0).

data.heading: divergeRoute
data.text: The route to which the road sign is pointing.

data.heading: forAccessCategory
data.text: The type of restriction that regulates access to a facility.

data.heading: forEnumeratedCondition
data.text: The enumerated condition that affects the applicability of the regulation.

data.heading: forMeasurableCondition
data.text: The measurable condition that affects the applicability of the regulation.

data.heading: forNonVehicularRoadUserType
data.text: The type of non-vehicular road user that is subject to the regulation.

data.heading: forRoadType
data.text: The type of road upon which travel is taking place.

data.heading: forStandingOrParkingCategory
data.text: The category of standing or parking within which travel is taking place.

data.heading: forTunnelCategory
data.text: The category of tunnel within which travel is taking place.

data.heading: forWeatherConditionType
data.text: The type of weather condition that is subject to the regulation.

data.heading: grantsDesignation
data.text: The permissions that are granted by the permit.

data.heading: hasActivationStatus
data.text: A code indicating the activation status of the traffic regulation.

data.heading: hasApplicableLocation
data.text: The location where the permit is applicable.

data.heading: hasApplicationInformation
data.text: Details about the application of the permit.

data.heading: hasApplicationInstructions
data.text: The method by which the permit can be obtained.

data.heading: hasApplicationUrl
data.text: The URL for the application of the permit.

data.heading: hasAssociatedFee
data.text: A fee that is associated with the instance of the traffic regulation.

data.heading: hasAssociatedRestriction
data.text: A restriction associated with the traffic regulation.

data.heading: hasCondition
data.text: A condition associated with the instance (for example a traffic regulation); not used for the part-whole composition of a ConditionSet, which uses cdm1:hasComponent.

data.heading: hasContactInformation
data.text: Contact information for the entity that is responsible for the traffic regulation.

data.heading: hasDefaultDurationLimit
data.text: The default duration of the permit.

data.heading: hasDefaultLocation
data.text: The default location of the permit.

data.heading: hasDefaultRepeatInterval
data.text: The default repeat interval of the permit.

data.heading: hasDisplayType
data.text: The type of display that is associated with the permit.

data.heading: hasDurationLimit
data.text: The maximum duration of the permit.

data.heading: hasGrantee
data.text: The entity that is granted the permit.

data.heading: hasGranteeType
data.text: The type of entity that is granted the permit.

data.heading: hasGrantor
data.text: The authority that is responsible for issuing the permit.

data.heading: hasInformationUrl
data.text: The URL for the information about the permit.

data.heading: hasLegalBasis
data.text: formal authority within the law (e.g., statute, ordinance, administrative rule, constitutional provision) that empowers an entity to create, adopt, or enforce a regulation

data.heading: hasPermitType
data.text: The type of permit.

data.heading: hasRegistrationMachine
data.text: A registration machine that is associated with the instance of the traffic regulation.

data.heading: hasRepeatInterval
data.text: The minimum time to the next entry.

data.heading: hasValidityPeriod
data.text: The validity period of the permit.

data.heading: image
data.text: An image that is associated with the traffic control device.

data.heading: implementedLocation
data.text: The location where the regulation was implemented (e.g., with traffic control devices).

data.heading: implementedValidity
data.text: The validity period for the condition as implemented.

data.heading: isActive
data.text: Indicates whether the condition is currently active.

data.heading: isApplicationRequired
data.text: Indicates whether an application is required for the permit.

data.heading: isLocationSpecific
data.text: Indicates whether the permit is location specific.

data.heading: issued
data.text: The date and time the permit was issued.

data.heading: issuedTro
data.text: A traffic regulation order issued by the entity.

data.heading: issuingAuthority
data.text: The entity that issued the instance of the traffic regulation order

data.heading: locationByOrder
data.text: The location where the regulation is defined to apply per the traffic regulation order.

data.heading: logicalOperator
data.text: The logical operator used to combine the Conditions in a ConditionSet.

data.heading: memberTrafficRegulation
data.text: A traffic regulation enacted by the traffic regulation order.

data.heading: nationalSignId
data.text: The national sign identifier for the traffic control device.

data.heading: negate
data.text: Indicates whether the condition is negated.

data.heading: otherCondition
data.text: A separate condition that determines the applicability of the regulation.

data.heading: pavementMarkingType
data.text: A code that indicates the type of pavement marking device.

data.heading: permitInformation
data.text: Information about any permits that are associated with the regulation.

data.heading: permittedEntityType
data.text: The type of entity that is permitted to use the permit.

data.heading: pictogram
data.text: The pictogram that is associated with the traffic control device.

data.heading: reasonCode
data.text: A reason justifying the existence of the instance of the traffic regulation order

data.heading: regulatoryScope
data.text: Indication of the types of regulations that can be enacted by the rule maker.

data.heading: requiredDesignation
data.text: The designation of the permit that is required for the instance of the traffic regulation.

data.heading: requiredDisplayType
data.text: The display type of the permit that is required for the instance of the traffic regulation.

data.heading: requiredGrantor
data.text: The grantor of the permit that is required for the instance of the traffic regulation.

data.heading: requiredGrantorType
data.text: The type of grantor of the permit that is required for the instance of the traffic regulation.

data.heading: requiredPermitIdentifier
data.text: The identifier of the permit that is required for the instance of the traffic regulation.

data.heading: roadSurfaceFeatureType
data.text: A code that indicates the type of road surface feature.

data.heading: simpleSignList
data.text: The rdf:List whose ordered members are SimpleSigns for this composite: list head is the main sign, and each rdf:rest continues the sequence.

data.heading: trafficImpactLocation
data.text: The location where traffic is impacted due to the existence of the regulation.

data.heading: troStatus
data.text: The current lifecycle status of the instance of the containing class

data.heading: url
data.text: The URL that is associated with the traffic control device.

data.heading: validityByOrder
data.text: The validity period for the condition.

data.heading: valueToCompare
data.text: The threshold value to compare against the current value to determine the applicability of the regulation.

data.heading: version
data.text: The version of the object.
